PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronald Carter specially appearing for Attorney Vernon Goins.

Mr. Carter stated that a petition for final distribution was provided to a messenger service for filing yesterday. The Court Clerk noted that said petition was pending in the Court's
e-file queue. The Status Report and Request for Authority to Continue Administration is continued to April 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Continued To Apr-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vernon Goins appeared by telephone for Franklyn Musgrave (Administrator).

Mr. Goins stated that he intends to file his final accounting within the next 30-days. The Court informed Mr. Goins that it did not receive courtesy copies of the petition for approval of the status report or a proposed order, and that no proof of service has been filed. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to April 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Goins to provide said documents.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Petition To Approve Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Continued To Dec-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: A. Santiago. Not reported.
